title: Algerian Chestnut Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful stew from North Africa, perfect for a chilly evening. This Algerian Chestnut Tagine combines the sweetness of chestnuts with the richness of spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, and smoked paprika. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped chestnuts and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the chestnuts are tender.
Stir in the chopped parsley and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
